title: dubautia × thyrsiflora
intro: Dubautia × thyrsiflora, also known as the Ma'o hau hele, is a rare and endangered plant species native to Hawaii. It is a type of flowering plant that has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dubautia × thyrsiflora include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Dubautia × thyrsiflora can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves, allowing for various methods of consumption and application.
